summary: Tested 5 new features/fixes: 1) Performance Overview chart X-axis shows actual trade dates (Jan 14, Jan 15, etc.) - PASS, 2) Notifications page shows correct time format (no 'NaNd ago') - PASS, 3) Create Signal dialog shows 'Send Email to Members' toggle when 'Official Trading Signal' is enabled - PASS, 4) Email templates API includes 'trading_signal' template type - PASS, 5) Backend signal creation accepts send_email parameter - PASS. Mobile responsiveness verified for dashboard and notifications.
critical_code_review_comments: DashboardPage.jsx correctly uses trade.created_at to generate date labels for chart X-axis
NotificationsPage.jsx has proper safeguards for date parsing with try-catch and fallback to 'Recently'
NotificationSheet.jsx formatTimeAgo function handles invalid dates gracefully
Header.jsx formatTimeAgo function has proper null/invalid date handling
AdminSignalsPage.jsx correctly shows send_email toggle conditionally when is_official is true
Backend server.py has send_signal_email_to_members helper function for auto-emailing members
Email templates API includes 'trading_signal' template with proper shortcodes
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 requested features/fixes verified working: 1) Chart X-axis shows actual trade dates, 2) Notification time format fixed (no NaN), 3) Send Email toggle appears when Official Signal enabled, 4) trading_signal email template exists, 5) Backend accepts send_email param. Mobile responsiveness verified.

features_tested.chart_x_axis_trade_dates: PASS - Shows Jan 14, Jan 15, Jan 16, Jan 19, Feb 3 instead of Trade 1, 2, 3
features_tested.notification_time_format: PASS - Shows '1 minute ago', 'about 14 hours ago', '16 days ago' - no NaNd ago
features_tested.send_email_toggle_in_signal_dialog: PASS - Toggle appears when Official Trading Signal is enabled
features_tested.trading_signal_email_template: PASS - API returns template with subject, body, and variables
features_tested.backend_send_email_param: PASS - Signal creation accepts is_official and send_email parameters
features_tested.mobile_dashboard: PASS - 4 KPI cards in 2x2 grid, chart visible, bottom nav present
features_tested.mobile_notifications: PASS - Correct time format, no NaN issues
